ab: lokah ta kwara, t’aring ta la.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: tuli! tatuk tunux.
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: lokah su psba biru.
en: B: Hello.

ab: tama kwara.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: lokah ta kwara. kisa ga sba’an cimu nya psba biru sankenu kmayan nni’un ke ta Tayal.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的泰雅語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Tayal.

ab: ba’un su mung ke na psba biru?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: psba biru, ini mu ba’iy. kayan cikah loyi ma?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ini mu pungiy, hopa cikah hngiyan su ma?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: kita cahay kwara! pgluw kinang mlpuw loyi.
ch: 請看這裡！跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: myasa ci nlpuw mamu.
en: It’s very well read.

ab: lpuw loyi. hopa cikah hngiyang mamu.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: iya htuw hngiyang. iya kayan ke.
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: agan biru mamu.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: angu, psba biru.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: agan bbrwan mamu.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: psba biru, waya mu yngyan bbrwan mu la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: agan ccong mamu.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: psba biru, waya mu yngyan ccong mu la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: ksiyu cikah ccong nya mluw m’was biru syaw su.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: syugiy cu cikah ccong su ma?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: masu ta tkba biru la.
en: Class is over.

ab: tehok cahay tkba’an ta, pkita ta ’nyan utux hngawan loyi.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
